Macros.WK: |Wallkick| AND (|Jump| OR |@DJ| OR |Long Jump| OR |Sideflip| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Backflip|))
Macros.GP near wall: |Ground Pound| AND (|Jump| OR |@DJ| OR |Sideflip| OR |Backflip| OR |@WK|)
Macros.BFGP height: (|Backflip| AND |Ground Pound|) OR (|Sideflip| AND |Ground Pound|) OR |@TJ|
Macros.Jumpdive distance: |Long Jump| OR (|Jump| AND |Kick|) OR (|@DJ| AND |Dive|) OR (|!reasonable| AND |Jump| AND |Dive|)
Macros.Pokeys: |Punch| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Dive|) OR |Slidekick| OR |@GP| OR |@Jumpkick| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@BF height|) OR |!obscure|
Macros.Spindrifts: |Punch| OR |@GP| OR |@Buffered Kick| OR |@Jumpkick| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@Any jump|) OR |!obscure|
Macros.Lakitu self-defense: |@GP| OR |@Jumpkick| OR (|!reasonable| AND (|Jump| OR |Sideflip|)) OR (|!obscure| AND |@Any jump|) OR |!Forgo self-defense| OR |!hard|
Macros.Bob-omb self-defense: |Punch| OR |@Buffered Kick| OR |@Jumpkick| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Jump|) OR |!Forgo self-defense| OR |!obscure|
Macros.C5 planks: (|@Forward jump| OR |@Forward BFWK|) AND (|@Jump height| OR |!obscure|)
Macros.C5 act 5: |@C5 planks| AND |@WK| AND |Vanish Cap| AND (|@Forward jump| OR |!hard|)
Macros.SFdive distance: |Long Jump| OR (|Jump| AND |Kick|) OR (|Jump| AND |Dive|) OR (|!reasonable| AND |@DJ|) OR (|!obscure| AND |Sideflip| AND |Dive|)
Macros.B3 low pipe: (|@Forward jump| AND |@Jump height|) OR (|!reasonable| and |Long Jump|) OR (|!hard| and |Dive| and |Slidekick| and |@Any jump|)
Macros.B3 boss pipe: |@B3 low pipe| AND |@Jumpdive distance| AND (|Long Jump| or |@DJ| or |!obscure|)

(|@Any jump| AND (|@Forward jump| OR |!reasonable|) AND |Stars:45|) OR |!Star Display warps|
|@Any jump| AND (|@Forward jump| OR |!reasonable|) AND |Key 1| AND |Stars:30|
(|@Any jump| AND (|@Forward jump| OR |!reasonable|) AND |Key 2| AND |Stars:60|) OR (|!Star Display warps| and |!Major Skips|)
((|@Any jump| OR |!obscure|) AND |Stars:1|) OR |!Star Display warps|
|@Barely LJLG height| AND (|@Forward jump| OR |!reasonable|) AND |@WK|
(|@Any jump| AND |Stars:18| AND (|@Forward jump| OR |!obscure|)) OR |!Star Display warps|
|@WK| AND (|@Forward jump| or |!obscure|) AND (|Metal Cap| or |!reasonable|)
